name: crime-intelligence-platform
description: Geospatial Crime Pattern Intelligence - ET AI Hackathon 2026

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,blue "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.lint: cd frontend && pnpm lint && cd ../backend && ruff check .
scripts.format: cd frontend && pnpm format && cd ../backend && black . && ruff check --fix .
scripts.test: cd backend && pytest && cd ../frontend && pnpm test
